channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 20+ 15ft tall street lights are not working, 25th March
item.description:
Affects lower hight street right upto to brewery quarter. All roar street lights are not switched on

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 368, High Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of large potholes and broken road surface clean square, 25th March
item.description:
Outside no 07-12 Clevedon square and around the whole loop broken and potholed road surface.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-6, Clevedon Square, Rowanfield, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streetlight down, 25th March
item.description:
The streetlight between house number 1 and number 3 is broken. Please send maintenance personnel to repair it. Thank you!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Newland View, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No street lights, 25th March
item.description:
There is no lights on in the street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Charles Street, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No street lights - dangerous and scary, 25th March
item.description:
All street lights in our area are not on. Very dark and dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Orchard Way, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 25th March
item.description:
Street light at W3W ///manual.pulse.transit (and I think other lights in vicinity in Littlecote Close, Kingsclere Drive and Marlborough Close) is not working this evening. The light outside number 3 is working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Littlecote Close, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The only street light in the close is not working., 25th March
item.description:
Street light in Windermere Close outside number 1.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Windermere Close, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bedroom furniture dumped in the woods, 25th March
item.description:
Mattress, bed and chairs dumped in a beautiful forest. Not visible from the road as it is off a steep drop.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Buckholt Road, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes across with of road by crossing, 25th March
item.description:
Potholes across with of road by pedestrian crossing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shelburne Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on road to Zoons Farm, 25th March
item.description:
Several black bags of rubbish have been dumped on side of lane up to Zoons Farm just after the bridge over the A417

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brockworth Bypass, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 Metal signs have been left at the entrance to the Footpath off Larkhay roadh., 25th March
item.description:
The signs are at the entrance to a footpath off Larkhay Rd and beside the st philips & st james church gate. They have been there several weeks, since the work to the path was completed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Noake Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Fly tipping, 25th March
item.description:
Owner of 10 Alstone Lane has dumped this on the pavement. Front Garden has been full of rubbish for years. Makes the area look like an absolute dump.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Alstone Lane, Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 25th March
item.description:
This rubbish appeared on Monday. The piece of furniture that was dumped there on Saturday has now gone.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Pates Avenue, Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 25th March
item.description:
Inside lane Northbound - on the outside part of the inside lane just before J11 about 200 yards before small blue sign that says M5 B 83.5
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M5, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 25th March
item.description:
Cway pothole Stat plan required 700mmx600mmx41mm Road closure TM required No parking cones required (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 25th March
item.description:
Edge deterioration CW 1000x20000x121mm Road closure (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 25th March
item.description:
Edge deterioration CW 500x1400x60mm Road closure (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 25th March
item.description:
Pothole CW 600x600x51mm Road closure (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 25th March
item.description:
Edge deterioration CW 1000x2000x60mm Road closure (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 25th March
item.description:
Pothole CW 1000x1000x40mm Road closure (CW6 Pothole)
